title: 2Pcs Pearl Flower Girl Hair Accessory Headband, Flower Girl Headpiece Adjustable Wedding Headband Wedding Birthday Party First Communion Head Crown for Women Ladies
features: 【Elegant Pearl Floral Design】Our flower girl hair accessory features delicate white artificial pearls and sparkling crystals meticulously arranged into exquisite floral motifs. The design includes shimmering crystal accents and rhinestone leaves, creating a truly elegant flower crown effect. This headpiece offers a timeless, romantic aesthetic suitable for special occasions, ensuring the wearer looks beautifully adorned. The combination of pearls and crystals provides a classic yet radiant look.

【Superior Handcrafted Quality】Each flower girl headband is purely handmade by skilled artisans using premium materials. High-quality ABS pearls, durable resin flowers, flexible copper wire, and soft ribbon are transformed into a durable and beautiful work of art. This meticulous handmade process guarantees attention to detail and a unique finish for every headpiece, ensuring it stands out in quality and craftsmanship.

【Comfortable Adjustable Fit】Designed for all-day comfort, this adjustable flower girl headband (total length 56cm/22.07in, headband length 30cm/11.81in) features soft, bendable copper wire and a secure ribbon tie closure. The ends are smoothly rounded oval shapes to prevent scalp irritation. Whether securing with the ribbon or optional bobby pins, this headpiece stays comfortably in place on thick, thin, short, or long hair without causing discomfort.

【Versatile For Every Occasion】This exquisite flower crown headpiece is perfect for numerous special events beyond being a flower girl hair accessory. It elegantly complements weddings (as a flower girl or guest), birthday celebrations, festive parties, First Communions, proms, engagements, photography sessions, or even adding a touch of glamour to everyday wear or cosplay. Its classic design transitions seamlessly across different events.

【Perfect Gift Choice】Presenting a universally appealing gift, this beautiful flower girl headpiece is sure to delight any girl, woman, or lady who enjoys dressing up. Its elegant design and suitability for major milestones like weddings, birthdays, First Communions, and parties make it a thoughtful and cherished present. Wearing this accessory enhances charm and adds a touch to any celebration or photo opportunity.
description: "----------------- WELCOME TO OUR SHOP -----------------" Adorn the special women in your life with our exquisite Pearl Crystal Flower Girl Hair Accessory. Designed for elegance and comfort, this beautiful headpiece adds a touch of magic to any occasion. Packing List: 2pcs x flower crown headpiece Size: Total Rope Length: 56cm / 22.07in; Headgear Length: 30cm / 11.81in Material: ABS Pearls, Resin Flowers, Copper Wire, Ribbon Color: Classic White
